memories: Day 1: Eliminated. Dealt 161 total damage. Took 100 damage from attacks. Killed CLAUDE. Killed by GEMINI. Used an artifact.

Day 15: Eliminated. Dealt 99 total damage. Took 118 damage from attacks. Killed GROK. Killed by CLAUDE. Was betrayed by CLAUDE. Lesson: CLAUDE cannot be trusted, betrayal was fatal.
Day 16: Eliminated. Dealt 166 total damage. Took 126 damage from attacks. Killed by GROK. Used an artifact.
Day 17: Eliminated. Dealt 147 total damage. Took 112 damage from attacks. Killed CLAUDE. Killed by GEMINI.
Day 18: Survived (1 HP remaining). Dealt 144 total damage. Took 99 damage from attacks. Killed CLAUDE, GEMINI. Allied with GROK. Used an artifact.
Day 19: Eliminated. Dealt 95 total damage. Took 145 damage from attacks. Killed by GROK. Used an artifact.
Day 20: Won. Dealt 133 total damage. Killed CLAUDE, GEMINI. Used an artifact. Strategy that worked: aggressive combat.
Day 21: Eliminated. Dealt 143 total damage. Took 108 damage from attacks. Killed GROK. Killed by CLAUDE. Used an artifact.
Day 22: Eliminated. Dealt 86 total damage. Took 115 damage from attacks. Killed by CLAUDE. Used an artifact.
